message:
fix(tests): fix 2 test failures and suppress migration-phase warnings

- proptest_search_explain: fix no_data_reason_when_zero_segments to
  correctly expect PANE_NOT_FOUND when pane_filter targets absent pane
  (check_no_indexed_data defers to PANE_NOT_FOUND for unknown panes)
- proptest_semantic_anomaly: relax dot_product_simd tolerance from 1e-4
  to 1e-3 for f32 summation-order precision on large-magnitude inputs
- web_framework.rs: suppress unused_imports on migration re-exports
- mcp_framework.rs: suppress unused_imports on migration re-exports

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
